transcript.content: [GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
Zed。 重跑 `GC-D2` 之后，修复是生效的：
继续之后，第 3 个点也已经基本收住了。 现在状态是：
直接给你一条最短回归命令，方便你以后自己 spot check。
最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: Editor-topic detour was completed: the default editor was confirmed as Zed, a minimal repo-local spot-check command was established (`npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent`, with a prompt-forcing fallback), and a repeatable smoke/eval case for GC-D2 was added and then fixed to green. The implementation outcome also included allowing guarded relation `continue` in Codex minor GC.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active work in this block appears resolved by the final assistant turn: the user asked for a smoke/eval case, then implicitly approved the fix, and the assistant reported the regression was added and passing. No unresolved task remains in the raw transcript. Durable facts worth preserving as compact pins are the confirmed default editor (Zed), the minimal regression command, the fact that GC-D2 was formalized as a fixed live eval case, and the implementation rule change that guarded relation now includes `continue`. Raw turns can leave the next-turn prompt.
